parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ doctype: 'Patient', patient_name: $json.patient_name, cpf: $json.cpf, birth_date: $json.birth_date, mobile: $json.mobile, city: $json.city, state: $json.state, country: $json.country }) }}

parameters.content:
## Sincronizacao Pedido -> ERPNext (Processo Completo)
Conforme doc 14 (passos 0/2/3). Webhook recebe TODO o payload de uma vez (pedido 100%).

**Fluxo:**
1. Webhook POST /webhook/erp/sincronizar-pedido
2. Normalizar Payload (mapeia companies->Customer, products->items, patients->Patient, medico->Prescriber, monta fp_patients)
3. ERP - Upsert Customer (POST /api/resource/Customer; PJ=Company se CNPJ 14 digitos, senao Individual; group Comercial; territory Brazil)
4. Preparar/Upsert Prescriber (CRM)
5. Preparar/Upsert Patient (CPF 11 digitos)
6. Montar Sales Order (liga cpf->patient_id; items + fp_patients; soma fp por item = qty do item)
7. ERP - Criar Sales Order (POST /api/resource/Sales Order)
8. ERP - Submeter (POST frappe.client.submit)
9. ERP - Auto Reservar (POST future_production_auto_reserve_sales_order)
10. Respond to Webhook (status + sales_order + reservas)

**Credenciais:** ERPNext = Header Auth 'ERPNext Injemed (temp)'. URL direta https://erp.injemedpharma.com.br (Ignore SSL ON). SKUs referenciados do HubSpot products; criar/sincronizar item no ERP se faltar.
**OBS:** chave temporaria sera rotacionada. Trocar credencial apos rotacao.
